subject: Final TxGNN tiny smoke constraints
description: Design the final TxGNN model smoke test to run on VPS with at most 2 CPU and 4G RAM using a tiny model and explicit systemd resource limits.
result: CLAUDE.md Phase 9 now specifies final TxGNN model smoke constraints: tiny model, systemd CPUQuota=200%, MemoryMax=4G, local/scratch data only, no production GCS mutation, pressure treated as blocker.
